steps.t: Shields, spears, and saddles can be found throughout the refugees' small camp north of Marton. You should collect spears, shields, and saddles for the…
The refugees' horses can be found at the head of their camp, north of Marton. You should saddle the horses to ready them for the dangerous journey to …
Agelwyn is in the refugees' small camp in the ravine north of Marton. You should speak with Agelwyn.
